case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY RECEIVED CHECK FROM CCSF

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
